economic_notes: GBEs include Takla Development Corporation, Sasuchan Development Corporation, Takla Master Limited Partnership, Tse Keh Nay LLP, Sus'tut GP Corp., Sus'tut Limited Partnership, Takla Nation Holdings Limited Partnership. Takla Trading Post shares sold from Takla Development Corporation to Sus'tut Limited Partnership on November 20, 2023. Write-down of $4,424,350 for advances from Takla Trading Post. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing of $879,524.
notes: 7 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis.
